projectDescription: A CLI automation tool for batch-registering AWS Builder ID accounts and switching Kiro IDE accounts with browser fingerprint spoofing and machine ID reset support.
keyFeatures: Automated AWS Builder ID account registration via Playwright browser automation
Temporary email inbox integration (tempmail.lol, 1secmail, mail.tm, guerrillamail, 215.im)
Browser fingerprint spoofing (Canvas, WebGL, Navigator, Screen, Timezone)
Batch registration with configurable concurrency and delay
Interactive CLI menus for both registration and account switching
Kiro IDE process management (kill, start, restart)
AWS SSO token file injection for seamless account switching
Windows machine ID (MachineGuid) reset for device fingerprint rotation
Proxy support for HTTP/HTTPS traffic routing
Anti-detection mechanisms: human-like mouse movement, input delays, page scroll simulation
publicApiSurface: npm run register -- [--count N] [--concurrency N] [--delayMs N] [--proxyUrl URL] [--no-fingerprint] [--no-incognito] [--non-interactive]
npm run switch -- [--template PATH] [--region REGION] [--index N] [--restart] [--reset-machine-id] [--dry-run]
createTempMail(log, timeout): Promise<{ email, token, password } | null>
getTempMailCode(token, email, log, timeout): Promise<string | null>
